name: io.github.Vortx-AI/emem
title: emem — Earth memory protocol
description: Content-addressed, ed25519-signed memory of every place on Earth. Apache-2.0, no keys for reads.

directoryCompliance.annotations: every tool emits title + annotations.{readOnlyHint,destructiveHint} on tools/list
directoryCompliance.auth: unauthenticated public-read; writes (emem_attest, emem_challenge) authenticated by ed25519 signature on the request body
directoryCompliance.originAllowlist: EMEM_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var (comma-separated) flips CORS from `*` to a strict allowlist with Vary: Origin

environmentVariables.name: EMEM_BIND
environmentVariables.description: Bind address for the HTTP server. Defaults to 0.0.0.0:5051 inside the container.

environmentVariables.name: EMEM_DATA
environmentVariables.description: Path to the persistent data directory (sled cache + ed25519 identity). Mount a volume here.

environmentVariables.name: EMEM_PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional canonical origin for self-referencing URLs in MCP responses (e.g. https://emem.dev). When unset the server falls back to urn:emem.

environmentVariables.name: EMEM_TLS_DOMAINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated hostnames for built-in Let's Encrypt ACME (TLS-ALPN-01). When set, the server binds 0.0.0.0:443 instead of EMEM_BIND.
